name: liveplay-monorepo
description: LivePlay — open-source audio playback for live sound operators. Monorepo root: client (Vue/Electron) + server (C++ audio engine).

scripts.server:run: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cands=['server/build/Release/liveplay-server.exe','server/build/liveplay-server.exe','server/build/liveplay-server'];const bin=cands.find(p=>fs.existsSync(p));if(!bin){console.error('build the server first: npm run server:build');process.exit(1)}spawnSync(path.resolve(bin),process.argv.slice(1),{stdio:'inherit'})"
